query:
SELECT CASE 
           WHEN 
                  (SELECT count(*) 
                   FROM dfs.`tmp/store_sales.parquet` AS store_sales 
                   WHERE store_sales.ss_quantity BETWEEN 1 AND 20) > 74129 THEN 
                  (SELECT avg(store_sales.ss_ext_discount_amt) 
                   FROM dfs.`tmp/store_sales.parquet` AS store_sales 
                   WHERE store_sales.ss_quantity BETWEEN 1 AND 20) 
           ELSE 
                  (SELECT avg(store_sales.ss_net_paid) 
                   FROM dfs.`tmp/store_sales.parquet` AS store_sales 
                   WHERE store_sales.ss_quantity BETWEEN 1 AND 20) 
       END bucket1, 
       CASE 
           WHEN 
                  (SELECT count(*) 
                   FROM dfs.`tmp/store_sales.parquet` AS store_sales 
                   WHERE store_sales.ss_quantity BETWEEN 21 AND 40) > 122840 THEN 
                  (SELECT avg(store_sales.ss_ext_discount_amt) 
                   FROM dfs.`tmp/store_sales.parquet` AS store_sales 
                   WHERE store_sales.ss_quantity BETWEEN 21 AND 40) 
           ELSE 
                  (SELECT avg(store_sales.ss_net_paid) 
                   FROM dfs.`tmp/store_sales.parquet` AS store_sales 
                   WHERE store_sales.ss_quantity BETWEEN 21 AND 40) 
       END bucket2, 
       CASE 
           WHEN 
                  (SELECT count(*) 
                   FROM dfs.`tmp/store_sales.parquet` AS store_sales 
                   WHERE store_sales.ss_quantity BETWEEN 41 AND 60) > 56580 THEN 
                  (SELECT avg(store_sales.ss_ext_discount_amt) 
                   FROM dfs.`tmp/store_sales.parquet` AS store_sales 
                   WHERE store_sales.ss_quantity BETWEEN 41 AND 60) 
           ELSE 
                  (SELECT avg(store_sales.ss_net_paid) 
                   FROM dfs.`tmp/store_sales.parquet` AS store_sales 
                   WHERE store_sales.ss_quantity BETWEEN 41 AND 60) 
       END bucket3, 
       CASE 
           WHEN 
                  (SELECT count(*) 
                   FROM dfs.`tmp/store_sales.parquet` AS store_sales 
                   WHERE store_sales.ss_quantity BETWEEN 61 AND 80) > 10097 THEN 
                  (SELECT avg(store_sales.ss_ext_discount_amt) 
                   FROM dfs.`tmp/store_sales.parquet` AS store_sales 
                   WHERE store_sales.ss_quantity BETWEEN 61 AND 80) 
           ELSE 
                  (SELECT avg(store_sales.ss_net_paid) 
                   FROM dfs.`tmp/store_sales.parquet` AS store_sales 
                   WHERE store_sales.ss_quantity BETWEEN 61 AND 80) 
       END bucket4, 
       CASE 
           WHEN 
                  (SELECT count(*) 
                   FROM dfs.`tmp/store_sales.parquet` AS store_sales 
                   WHERE store_sales.ss_quantity BETWEEN 81 AND 100) > 165306 THEN 
                  (SELECT avg(store_sales.ss_ext_discount_amt) 
                   FROM dfs.`tmp/store_sales.parquet` AS store_sales 
                   WHERE store_sales.ss_quantity BETWEEN 81 AND 100) 
           ELSE 
                  (SELECT avg(store_sales.ss_net_paid) 
                   FROM dfs.`tmp/store_sales.parquet` AS store_sales 
                   WHERE store_sales.ss_quantity BETWEEN 81 AND 100) 
       END bucket5 
FROM dfs.`tmp/reason.parquet` AS reason 
WHERE reason.r_reason_sk = 1
